segments: S.E.T. (Sports Medicine, Extremities, Trauma, Craniomaxillofacial and Thoracic)
Technology & Data, Bone Cement and Surgical

supply_chain.dependencies: Certain materials and components can only be obtained from a single source or a limited number of sources due to quality considerations, expertise, costs or constraints resulting from regulatory requirements
supply_chain.risks: Reduction or interruption in supply of materials or components; inability to timely develop and validate alternative sources; significant increase in price of materials or components; sterilization capacity constraints; supplier bankruptcy or financial constraints; global supply chain disruptions from macro factors

regulatory_risks: FDA Quality System regulations and inspections
European Union Medical Device Regulation (EU MDR) compliance requirements
UK Medical Device Regulation (UK MDR) implementation
Healthcare fraud and abuse laws (False Claims Act, Anti-Kickback Statute, Stark law)
Data privacy and security laws (GDPR, state privacy laws)
Artificial intelligence and machine learning regulatory requirements
Healthcare cost containment measures and reimbursement reductions
Buy local initiatives in various countries
Italy Pay Back law and Fund for Government of Medical Devices
Product recall and safety alert requirements
Tax law changes including OECD Pillar Two implementation

sanction_risks: OFAC sanctions affecting ability to operate in certain markets
Sanctions impacting ability to collect payment in affected countries
Export controls on goods to China and certain other countries
